command_log.command: echo 'Checking environment...' && which jq && which bash
ls -la .wheel/history/success/ 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && ls -la .wheel/outputs/ 2>/dev/null

SKILL_BASE_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.441/skills/wheel-run" && PLUGIN_DIR="$SKILL_BASE_DIR/../.." && WHEEL_LIB_DIR="${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/dispatch.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/lock.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/context.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/engine.sh" && WORKFLOW_FILE="workflows/command-chain.json" && WORKFLOW=$(workflow_load "$WORKFLOW_FILE") && if [[ $? -ne 0 ]]; then echo "ERROR: Workflow validation failed."; exit 1; fi && if ! workflow_validate_unique_ids "$WORKFLOW"; then echo "ERROR: Duplicate step IDs."; exit 1; fi && echo "Validation passed." && echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq '{name: .name, steps: [.steps[].id]}'

WORKFLOW_NAME="branch-multi" && WORKFLOW_FILE="workflows/${WORKFLOW_NAME}.json" && if [[ ! -f "$WORKFLOW_FILE" ]]; then echo "ERROR: Workflow file not found: $WORKFLOW_FILE"; echo "Available workflows:"; ls workflows/*.json 2>/dev/null || echo "  (none)"; exit 1; fi && echo "Found: $WORKFLOW_FILE"
ls workflows/loop-test.json 2>/dev/null && echo "EXISTS" || echo "NOT FOUND"

ls -la .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null || echo "No state files"; ls -la .wheel/pending.json 2>/dev/null || echo "No pending.json"; cat .wheel/outputs/check-env.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "No check-env output yet"
find /Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.434 -type f | head -30

EXISTING=$(ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null || true) && if [[ -n "$EXISTING" ]]; then echo "Active workflows:"; for sf in $EXISTING; do NAME=$(jq -r '.workflow_name // "unknown"' "$sf" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); echo "  $(basename $sf): $NAME"; done; echo ""; echo "Run /wheel-stop to stop them, or /wheel-status to check progress."; echo "Multiple concurrent workflows are supported — proceeding."; else echo "No active workflows."; fi

PLUGIN_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.441" && WHEEL_LIB_DIR="${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/dispatch.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/lock.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/context.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/engine.sh" && WORKFLOW_FILE="workflows/loop-test.json" && WORKFLOW=$(workflow_load "$WORKFLOW_FILE") && echo "VALIDATION OK" && workflow_validate_unique_ids "$WORKFLOW" && echo "UNIQUE IDS OK"
cat .wheel/state_0f1fe6bf-0236-4f54-bd9b-71b6b375a9bd_a5aeb5f8b5948e40e.json | jq .
cat .wheel/outputs/check-env.txt
date +%s
mkdir -p /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/reports

cat > /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/reports/env-report.md << 'ENDOFFILE'
# Environment Check Report

## Detected Tools

| Tool | Path | Status |
|------|------|--------|
| jq | /usr/bin/jq | Available |
| bash | /opt/homebrew/bin/bash | Available |

## Summary

Environment check passed. Both required tools (jq and bash) are available on the system. jq is installed at the system level (/usr/bin/jq) and bash is installed via Homebrew (/opt/homebrew/bin/bash).
ENDOFFILE
echo "Written successfully"
jq '{status, cursor, steps: [.steps[] | {id, status}]}' .wheel/state_0f1fe6bf-0236-4f54-bd9b-71b6b375a9bd_a5aeb5f8b5948e40e.json
ls -la .wheel/outputs/ && echo "---" && cat .wheel/outputs/verify-report.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "No verify-report yet"
jq '{status, cursor, steps: [.steps[] | {id, status}]}' .wheel/state_0f1fe6bf-0236-4f54-bd9b-71b6b375a9bd_a5aeb5f8b5948e40e.json
test -f reports/env-report.md && grep -q . reports/env-report.md && echo 'SUCCESS' || echo 'FAILURE'
branch: condition='grep -q SUCCESS .wheel/outputs/verify-report.txt' exit=0 target=cleanup-success

jq '{status, cursor, steps: [.steps[] | {id, status}]}' .wheel/state_0f1fe6bf-0236-4f54-bd9b-71b6b375a9bd_a5aeb5f8b5948e40e.json 2>/dev/null || echo "State file gone (archived?)" && ls .wheel/history/success/ 2>/dev/null
